title: ReportBase
description: Shared shape for AI-generation pipeline stage reports (validation, coherence, balance). Each report carries the stage identifier, the input record's ID, the verdict, an optional findings list with severities, and a metrics map for stage-specific numerics. See docs/architecture/ai-generation-pipeline.md and docs/implementation-plans/16-implementation-readiness-plan.md (T6).

path.description: JSON pointer or dotted path to the offending field; optional.

metrics.description: Stage-specific numeric measurements. Values are integers or fixed-point decimals serialized as numbers. Keys are stage-defined.
